name: spectral-skills
description: Agent-oriented spectral data skills for leakage-safe spectral reading, quality checking, splitting, preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, optimization, reporting, and workflow routing.

interface.longDescription: Spectral Skills packages nine coordinated Codex skills for spectral data reading, quality checking, splitting, preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, optimization, reporting, and workflow routing. The bundle keeps shared runtime code and schemas inside one plugin image so the skills install and update together.
defaultPrompt: Read spectral data into a standard package.
